name: Latigo Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 each Anchos chili peppers, dried & minced
8 each Green Chili peppers, chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large cast iron pot.
2. Add meat, onions, garlic, and peppers to the pot.
3. Sauté until the meat is browned.
4. Add beer and tequila; bring to a boil.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, vinegar, 3 tablespoons cumin, All-Spice, tomatoes, tomato sauce, and Cayenne pepper flakes.
6. Simmer for 1 hour.
7. Add remaining cumin, Tabasco sauce, tomato paste, and honey.
8. Continue simmering for another hour, stirring frequently.
9. Turn heat up to medium-high; cook for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Serve hot or refrigerate and reheat the next day.
